## Requirement

Example active FR bound to a Linear ticket. Validates that `tracker:` frontmatter renders as a linked primary reference in INDEX and is preserved across skill runs.

## Acceptance Criteria

- AC-Y.1: `tracker.linear` appears in INDEX row's Tracker column
- AC-Y.2: Provider.sync() no-ops on read-only skills; updates ACs on /implement

## Technical Design

Exercise path: TrackerProvider.sync() emits the `tracker.linear` ref alphabetically-first.

## Testing

Regression probe snapshot covers INDEX rendering of this entry.

None.
